# Release notes

Tag: ${{ env.TAG_NAME }}

## Highlights

- Cloudbank UI polish and realtime dashboard
- Vite + React 19 + Tailwind v4 setup
- GitHub Pages deployment via Actions

## Changes

- Revamp App layout with Tailwind tokens and controls
- Realtime analytics dashboard with DPR-aware canvas
- useKV persistence for files, metrics, tasks
- Vite dev/preview ports config
- CI build + lint workflow
- Pages deploy workflow for dist/

## How to run locally

- npm ci
- npm run dev

## Acknowledgments

Thanks to contributors and reviewers.
